MINI MINUTES: This cause comes on regular calendar this day for settlement conference. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Patricia L. Van Steenberge. Linda Reyes, Esq. represented the Plaintiff Plaza East Associates and Defendant Tina Brown appeared in pro per. Case did not settle. Trial date is confirmed.
